name: Smart Automation & Intrusion Detection System
description: A multi-functional automation and security system that performs communication tasks and detects unauthorized access by capturing images on failed login attempts and sending alerts via email.
features: Security feature: Captures image on wrong password attempt

name: Web-Based Automation Control Panel
description: A dashboard that allows users to trigger and manage automation scripts through a web interface instead of command line.

description: Deployed and managed applications on AWS cloud infrastructure with hands-on server management and Linux operations.

name: Generative AI Workflow Implementations
description: Built AI-based workflows using prompt engineering and automation concepts for real-world use cases.
